title: Create: Linked Thrusters
description: Adds new thrusters all with redstone link functionality built in to Create: Aeronautics
body: Add's new thrusters (all with built in redstone link functionality) to Create: Aeronautics. - Liquid Thruster - Commercial Jet Engine - Creative Thruster Liquid thruster and Commercial Jet Engine works with vanilla lava as well as liquid fuels from various Create mods. Also adds the Linked Flap Bearing that has the same linking functionality. **SHIFT + RIGHT CLICK** on a linking block brings up the frequency GUI which works the same as a redstone link. This mod is very early in development. If you find problems please let me know.
